Amara Okafor, DOB 02/09/2004, NDIS #518267341. Lives at home with parents in Blacktown NSW. Spastic quadriplegic cerebral palsy (GMFCS Level IV). Uses a power wheelchair and an AAC communication device. Medications: Baclofen 10mg three times daily; Levetiracetam 500mg twice daily for seizures. Allergic to penicillin. Has an existing Seizure Management Plan held by her mother (Grace Okafor, 0411 333 444) and a Behaviour Support Plan is NOT in place. Needs full assistance with personal care, transfers (hoist), and meals. Goals: communicate more independently using her device, attend a community art group, and maintain skin integrity / posture. Sees a physio weekly and a speech therapist fortnightly; support workers provide daily personal care. Power wheelchair due for review; bathroom needs a ceiling hoist installed.
